personal.title: Software Engineer · Cisco Systems

bio.paragraph1: A results-driven Software Engineer with hands-on experience in migrating legacy systems to modern, cloud-native environments. Proven expertise in the full software development lifecycle, from backend development with Java/Spring Boot to frontend implementation with React.
bio.paragraph2: Specialized in Kubernetes, Docker, and GitOps workflows using Helm and FluxCD. A proactive problem-solver with unique cross-functional experience in network engineering (CCNA) and data analytics, passionate about building scalable, mission-critical software.
